topic.title: 신용카드 부채 관리
topic.description: 신용카드 빚을 효과적으로 관리하고 재정 건강을 개선하는 방법을 배우세요.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 신용카드 빚을 잘 관리하는 것이 중요해요.
매달 최소 상환액 이상을 갚도록 노력하세요.
불필요한 지출을 줄이면 빚을 더 빨리 갚을 수 있어요.
개인 예산을 세우고 지키는 것이 도움이 됩니다.
높은 이자율을 가진 카드부터 갚아나가는 것이 현명해요.
정기적으로 재정 상황을 점검하는 습관을 들이세요.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Managing credit card debt well is important.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Managing credit card debt well | is important.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Try to pay more than the minimum payment each month.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Try to pay | more than the minimum payment | each month.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Reducing unnecessary spending can help you pay off debt faster.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Reducing unnecessary spending | can help you | pay off debt faster.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Creating and sticking to a personal budget is helpful.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Creating and sticking to | a personal budget | is helpful.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: It's wise to pay off cards with high interest rates first.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: It's wise to pay off cards | with high interest rates | first.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Make a habit of checking your financial situation regularly.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Make a habit of checking | your financial situation | regularly.
